name: Powerup
author: Poki
description: Create a shocking connection in Powerup! In this puzzle game made by Nitrome, you'll have to connect up two robots - one with power and one without. You can use iron boxes to connect the two robots. Once the connection is made, you can create an electrical circuit between the two! As you progress, you'll have to get smart about how you make the connections, as some robots can be harder to reach. Can you beat al 32 levels and power-up all the robots? How to play Powerup? Use WASD or the arrow keys to move! Use spacebar to fire your weapon! Who created Powerup? Powerup is created by Nitrome. Play their other games on Poki: Bad Ice-Cream , Double Edged and Dangle How can I play Powerup for free? You can play Powerup for free on Poki. Can I play Powerup on mobile devices and desktop? Powerup can be played on your computer only.
